title: Vegan Empanada Filling with Uruguayan Twist
description: A unique vegan empanada filling using Uruguayan ingredients, featuring a savory combination of flavors.
instructions: Combine mirin, bitter, uruguayan, and salt in a bowl. Mix well.
Roll out the empanada dough and cut into desired shapes.
Brush the dough with coconut oil and place a spoonful of the filling on each.
Fold the dough in half and press the edges to seal.
Place the empanadas on a baking sheet and brush with coconut oil.
Bake for 20-25 minutes or until golden brown.
Note: You can also use pre-made empanada dough or make your own from scratch.
To make your own dough, combine flour and water in a bowl and knead until smooth. Let rest for 30 minutes before rolling out.
